name: EmergencyAlertarr
description: Emergency Alert System overlays (NWS + FEMA IPAWS) for IPTV channels
author: sds8910

confirm.message: This will arm the selected channel(s) for EAS monitoring. The channel returns to passthrough under normal conditions and switches to the full EAS overlay automatically when an NWS or IPAWS alert fires for your configured area. Continue?
This will restore the original stream profile and remove EAS monitoring for the selected channel(s). Continue?

This will fire a test EAS alert on the selected channel(s) — header tones, attention tones, silence, then EOM tones — then auto-restore. Use this to verify your tones and overlay look correct. Continue?
This will broadcast the custom alert defined in the Custom Alert Injection settings on the selected EAS channel(s), with the full overlay, tones, and (if enabled) spoken readout. Continue?
This will permanently erase the recorded EAS alert history. Continue?

This will UNARM every channel, restore all original profiles, delete all EmergencyAlertarr cloned profiles, and erase all EAS mappings for a full clean slate. Use this if old armings persisted after reinstalling. Continue?
This will restart the background polling thread. EAS monitoring will resume within 15 seconds. Continue?
This will send a graceful restart signal to Dispatcharr. The page will go offline briefly — refresh in about 15 seconds. Continue?
